title: Open Question on Near-Bipartiteness for Diameter 3 (Yang–Yuan / Brandstädt et al.)
statement_text: What is the complexity of Near-Bipartiteness for graphs of diameter 3?
context_text: Yang and Yuan proved that Near-Bipartiteness is polynomial-time solvable for graphs of diameter 2 and NP-complete for graphs of diameter 4, leaving the diameter-3 case open. The same question was independently posed by Brandstädt et al. The paper resolves this by proving NP-completeness for diameter 3, completing the full complexity classification for all diameters.
attributed_to: Yang and Yuan; Brandstädt et al.
paper_contribution: Proves that Near-Bipartiteness (and thus Independent Feedback Vertex Set) is NP-complete for graphs of diameter 3, fully resolving the open question and establishing a dichotomy: polynomial-time solvable for diameter at most 2, NP-complete for diameter at least 3.
paper_title: Independent Feedback Vertex Sets for Graphs of Bounded Diameter
